mapper.select: SELECT ID, PLAN_CODE, PLAN_NAME, ROUTE_ID, PATROL_TYPE, INITIAL_DATE, SET_DATE, IS_SINGLE, PATROL_ID, PATROL_NAME, RECENTLY_TASK_DATE, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, TIME_LIMIT FROM E_PATROL_PLAN WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, PLAN_CODE, PLAN_NAME, ROUTE_ID, PATROL_TYPE, INITIAL_DATE, SET_DATE, IS_SINGLE, PATROL_ID, PATROL_NAME, RECENTLY_TASK_DATE, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, TIME_LIMIT FROM E_PATROL_PLAN WHERE STATUS = 1 AND( IS_SINGLE ='2' OR RECENTLY_TASK_DATE IS NULL)

SELECT t1.ID, t1.PARENT_ID, t1.EQUIP_ID, t1.SORT_NUM, t3.CHECK_CONTENT, t3.QUALIFY_CONDITION, t3.CHECK_METHOD FROM E_PATROL_ROUTE_SUB t1 LEFT JOIN E_PATROL_STANDARD t2 ON t1.EQUIP_ID = t2.EQPT_ID LEFT JOIN E_PATROL_STANDARD_SUB t3 ON t2.ID = t3.PARENT_ID WHERE t1.PARENT_ID = #{routeId}

select ID, ROUTE_CODE, ROUTE_NAME, ROUTE_LEVEL, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_PATROL_ROUTE where 1=1
AND ROUTE_NAME LIKE #{routeNameLike}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_PATROL_PLAN ( ID, PLAN_CODE, PLAN_NAME, ROUTE_ID, PATROL_TYPE, INITIAL_DATE, SET_DATE, IS_SINGLE, PATROL_ID, PATROL_NAME, RECENTLY_TASK_DATE, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, TIME_LIMIT
) values ( #{id}, #{planCode}, #{planName}, #{routeId}, #{patrolType}, #{initialDate}, #{setDate}, #{isSingle}, #{patrolId}, #{patrolName}, #{recentlyTaskDate}, #{status}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{timeLimit} )
mapper.update: update E_PATROL_PLAN set PLAN_CODE = #{planCode}, PLAN_NAME = #{planName}, ROUTE_ID = #{routeId}, PATROL_TYPE = #{patrolType}, INITIAL_DATE = #{initialDate}, SET_DATE = #{setDate}, IS_SINGLE = #{isSingle}, PATROL_ID = #{patrolId}, PATROL_NAME = #{patrolName}, RECENTLY_TASK_DATE = #{recentlyTaskDate}, STATUS = #{status}, TIME_LIMIT = #{timeLimit}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where ID = #{id}
